questions.onset: When did your abdominal pain begin, and is it getting worse?
questions.location: Can you tell me where the pain is—upper, lower, right, left, or all over?
questions.vomiting: Have you been vomiting repeatedly or unable to keep fluids down? (yes/no)
questions.blood: Have you noticed any blood when vomiting or in your stool, or black tarry stools?
